assumptions: Auditing Product Strategy PDF only (Strategy Brief PDF not in scope this session).
Live project dpadrlxukcjbewpqympu and api/www.vergeo5.com are production-of-record.
Operator SQL is not end-user RLS view; used only for aggregates/schema.
Repository OpenAPI/code may support PARTIAL but not VERIFIED production behavior alone.
Phase2/3 items marked MISSING are acceptable if explicitly gated; CONFLICT when live posture contradicts Phase1 claims.

facts.fact: Document is Product Strategy & Catalogue Architecture for Convergeo across Zambia (companion to Strategic Master Plan).
facts.evidence: PDF title/date extracted; foundation contract used
facts.impact: Sets audit scope as catalogue architecture requirements, not operational order data
facts.recommended_action: Keep as requirements baseline for catalogue pebbles

facts.fact: Canonical Product is golden record; VendorListing holds price, stock, condition per vendor.
facts.evidence: Live: products=150, vendor_listings=134; columns price_ngwee/condition/stock_*; catalog API total=134
facts.impact: Core model present — foundation for comparison commerce
facts.recommended_action: Retain; extend with product_class without breaking FK

facts.fact: Every item fits one of five product classes A–E (Branded SKU, Branded variant, Commodity, One-of-a-kind, Made-to-order).
facts.evidence: information_schema: no product_class column on products or vendor_listings
facts.impact: Cannot drive class-specific comparison, stock, or onboarding rules
facts.recommended_action: P0 schema: additive product_class enum on products + vendor_listings with backfill default A for current demo

facts.fact: Add product_class enum (A–E) on both Product and VendorListing; Class D/E use product_id NULL with listing-owned title/description/images.
facts.evidence: product_id nullable VERIFIED; live listings_null_product=0; API mode quick_list sets product_id NULL; product_class MISSING
facts.gap: missing field (product_class); no D/E production records
facts.impact: D/E path partially coded via quick_list but not classified or seeded
facts.recommended_action: Add product_class; document quick_list as D/C bridge; seed/test null-product listings

facts.fact: Class B uses canonical with variants (variant table beneath product); per-unit per variant.
facts.evidence: to_regclass('public.product_variants')=false; no variant_id column
facts.impact: Pack-size comparison (mealie 5/10/25kg) cannot be modeled as variants
facts.recommended_action: P1 design additive variants or encode pack size in products.spec + related products until table lands

facts.fact: Six pricing modes required from day one: per-unit fixed, per-weight/volume, per-bunch/pile/bundle, tiered/volume, range/from, quote-only.
facts.matching_strategy: schema enums + OpenAPI ListingCreateRequest + row counts
facts.evidence: Per-unit via price_ngwee VERIFIED; tiered via price_tiers jsonb+CHECK VERIFIED (0 rows with tiers); quote flows exist for services/jobs not product listings; no pricing_mode/sale_unit; condition/stock enums lack weight/bunch/range modes
facts.impact: Market/commodity and made-to-order pricing cannot be represented correctly
facts.recommended_action: P0 additive pricing_mode + unit fields; keep per-unit UI default; wire tiered UI for B2B

facts.fact: Class A/B/C products carry sale_unit and optional base_unit; platform shows price-per-base-unit.
facts.evidence: No sale_unit/base_unit columns; catalog API has no price_per_base fields
facts.impact: Cross-pack comparison shopping breaks for staples
facts.recommended_action: P1 add unit fields + computed price-per-base in comparison API/UI

facts.fact: Display any currency, settle ZMW; imported goods may peg USD with daily FX margin; lock FX at order placement.
facts.db_api_target: orders/payments currency fields; listing fx peg (expected)
facts.evidence: No fx_currency/peg columns on listings; money is ZMW ngwee-only in live schema; 0 payments to observe FX lock
facts.impact: Vendor currency exposure on imports unaddressed
facts.recommended_action: P2 design FX peg after Phase1 per-unit ZMW path proven; do not claim Q23 product refinements live

facts.fact: Class A/B/D listings must declare controlled condition enum: New; New (open box); Refurbished; Used Excellent/Good/Fair; For parts/not working.
facts.evidence: Live CHECK allows only ('new','refurbished'); OpenAPI same; all 134 listings condition=new
facts.gap: bad/narrow enum vs document; missing used tiers
facts.impact: Used-goods trust model cannot operate; search/returns/escrow cannot branch on used tiers
facts.recommended_action: P0 expand condition CHECK + API enums; migration + vendor UI + facets

facts.fact: Used items get longer escrow window (72h rather than 48h).
facts.evidence: release_after_delivered_hours=48 only; no condition-keyed override; n8n escrow release workflow absent (only dispatch + payment recon)
facts.impact: P0 money/trust: used-goods escrow policy not enforceable
facts.recommended_action: Investigate P0: add condition-based hold config + escrow release automation before enabling used listings

facts.fact: Non-New listings require evidence photos (powered-on + IMEI for phones; VIN/mileage/angles for vehicles; real item photo for salaula).
facts.evidence: listing_images stores cloudinary_public_id/position only; no IMEI/VIN/evidence_kind; all 134 images demo/ prefix per foundation
facts.impact: Fraud vector for used goods uncontrolled
facts.recommended_action: P0 before Class D launch: evidence requirements in listing create + admin review

facts.fact: Counterfeit defences: Tier2/3-only on high-risk categories; brand-protection claim on canonical page; customer 'this looks fake' report to admin.
facts.evidence: No authenticity-report endpoint found in OpenAPI path list; brand claim flow not present; KYC records=0 (foundation); flags table empty
facts.impact: High-counterfeit categories unsafe if opened
facts.recommended_action: P1 authenticity report + category×tier gates; brand claim later

facts.fact: Stock modes: tracked numeric; made-to-order (capacity/lead time); by-weight bulk; always-available.
facts.evidence: CHECK/OpenAPI only tracked|always_available; live all 134 tracked; no capacity_per_week/lead_time_days columns
facts.impact: Class C weight and Class E capacity cannot be stocked correctly
facts.recommended_action: P1 extend stock_mode enum + fields after product_class

facts.fact: Checkout stock reservation 10–15 minutes; reserved counts as OOS; unpaid expiry releases atomically.
facts.matching_strategy: config value + table existence + row count
facts.evidence: reservation_ttl_min=15 VERIFIED; stock_reservations table exists (foundation) with 0 rows; no live paid checkout exercised this session
facts.impact: Oversell protection unproven in production money path
facts.recommended_action: P0 staged money test of reserve→pay→release before public launch

facts.fact: Flag vendors with cancel-rate >5%; auto-suspend at 10%.
facts.matching_strategy: OpenAPI path + repo behavior note (no mutation)
facts.evidence: OpenAPI includes /admin/governance/vendors; repo states signal is read-only (no auto-suspend); 0 orders so rates not observable live
facts.gap: configuration/workflow — warn exists, auto-suspend not enforced
facts.impact: Inventory honesty circuit-breaker incomplete
facts.recommended_action: P1 enable controlled auto-suspend with audit log after order volume exists

facts.fact: Five vendor onboarding flows: search-and-attach; submit-new-canonical; commodity quick-list; unique-item (D); made-to-order template (E).
facts.evidence: Live OpenAPI modes: attach, new_canonical, quick_list only; quick_list nulls product_id; no unique/made_to_order modes or MTO spec form fields
facts.gap: missing modes D/E + vendor UI not exercised (auth)
facts.impact: Cannot onboard salaula/used/MTO per brief
facts.recommended_action: P1 add unique + made_to_order modes; verify vendor UI against API

facts.fact: Bulk ops: CSV import matching canonicals; Tier3 API webhook stock sync.
facts.evidence: Import endpoints present in live OpenAPI; webhook stock-sync not found as dedicated product; paid_tiers flag false
facts.gap: webhook stock sync unsupported; CSV runtime NOT_AUDITABLE without vendor auth
facts.impact: Tier3 POS sync not live
facts.recommended_action: P2 webhook stock sync after Tier3; verify CSV matching in staging

facts.fact: Primary search engine is Meilisearch; pgvector semantic layer; hybrid BM25+vector with RRF, then geo/quality re-rank.
facts.matching_strategy: live search API + repo search service + locked stack docs
facts.evidence: Live /search returns rrf_score + boost_signals via Postgres FTS/trgm/pgvector (degraded=true observed); no Meilisearch service in production inventory; CLAUDE.md locks Postgres FTS+pgvector
facts.impact: Do not provision Meilisearch; treat brief search engine claim as superseded
facts.recommended_action: P0 doc reconciliation: mark Meilisearch superseded by D18–D24 Postgres search; keep RRF requirements

facts.fact: Ranking additions: in-stock boost; price competitiveness below median within canonical.
facts.evidence: Live phone search listings show boost_signals.in_stock=true and below_median=false; signals present; competitiveness effect not proven across multi-vendor canonicals (many products have listing_count=1)
facts.impact: Ranking levers exist but demo catalogue may not exercise median competition
facts.recommended_action: P2 seed multi-vendor same-SKU listings to validate below_median boost

facts.fact: Three discovery modes on homepage with equal weight: Browse, Search, Ask (Ask Phase3).
facts.evidence: /en 200, /en/search 200, /en/ask 200 (Ask Vergeo + quota copy); /en/categories 404; /en/compare 404
facts.gap: UI browse taxonomy route missing/renamed; Ask present early vs Phase3 note
facts.impact: Browse IA incomplete vs brief
facts.recommended_action: P1 confirm browse entrypoints (home chips vs /categories); align Ask phase messaging

facts.fact: Class C geo re-ranking weight should be 2–3× Class A.
facts.evidence: No product_class; cannot verify per-class geo multiplier; listing lat/lng often null in sample catalog items
facts.impact: Commodity hyperlocal ranking unverified
facts.recommended_action: After product_class lands, audit ranking SQL/config with sample lat/lng

facts.fact: ~100 product sub-categories across 13 departments must be absorbable by data model.
facts.evidence: Live 8 root departments (74 categories total) matching Phase1 set; Phase2/3 departments (fresh, alcohol, health, automotive, agriculture, crafts, pets, digital beyond tickets, etc.) absent as roots
facts.gap: missing master taxonomy for non-Phase1 departments
facts.impact: Expected: Phase1-scoped taxonomy OK; full Zambia catalogue incomplete
facts.recommended_action: P2 additive category migrations per phase; do not force 13 departments at launch

facts.fact: Phase1 launch departments: Food staples; Personal Care; Fashion; Electronics selective; Home & Living; Office & Stationery; Building light; Event tickets.
facts.evidence: Roots: groceries-staples, personal-care-beauty, fashion, electronics, home-living, office-stationery, light-hardware, event-tickets
facts.impact: Taxonomy aligns with Phase1 brief
facts.recommended_action: Keep; deepen SKUs within roots

facts.fact: Public launch Day60 target: 75–100 active vendors with ≥5 products each.
facts.evidence: active_vendors=3; listings=134 (demo); public_launch=false; sell CTA unavailable on www
facts.gap: missing production vendor cohort vs target
facts.impact: Release blocker for claiming Day60 marketplace readiness
facts.recommended_action: P0 controlled vendor onboarding when signup CTA/env ready; replace demo catalogue

facts.fact: Event tickets in Phase1 (Day49–53 plan) with dynamic QR; sits in taxonomy with class=ticket flag.
facts.evidence: event-tickets category root exists; events=0 tickets=0; n8n tickets-issue workflow absent; product_class/ticket flag absent
facts.gap: schema present, operational records + automation missing
facts.impact: Cannot sell/issue tickets in production
facts.recommended_action: P0 before ticket launch: activate issuance workflow + seed real events

facts.fact: Phase2 adds Class C produce, Class D used goods/salaula, heavy building materials, agriculture inputs, used vehicles.
facts.evidence: No fresh/agriculture/automotive root categories; no product_class; condition lacks used; vendor_locations=0
facts.gap: intentionally out of Phase1 — confirm not enabled
facts.impact: Correctly absent if Phase1-only; blocker if marketed as available
facts.recommended_action: Gate UI/copy so Phase2 categories cannot be selected until schema ready

facts.fact: Phase3: Class E MTO; OTC pharma with ZAMRA; crafts; live animals/alcohol delivery; AI ask after ≥10K transactions.
facts.evidence: Ask UI live early with quotas; orders/payments=0 (<<10K); MTO/pharma gates not evidenced; public_launch false
facts.gap: Ask ahead of data grounding; regulated categories not modeled
facts.impact: Ask quality/risk if relied on without catalogue depth
facts.recommended_action: Keep Ask quota-limited; defer regulated categories; track txn ground-truth gate

facts.fact: Canonical Product/VendorListing works for all five classes if product_class added and product_id nullable for D/E.
facts.evidence: Nullable product_id VERIFIED; product_class MISSING; quick_list implements null product_id
facts.gap: half of stated schema implication delivered
facts.impact: Catalogue behaviour still flat
facts.recommended_action: Ship product_class migration as highest-leverage catalogue pebble

facts.fact: Class A/B support comparison view, shared images, price-and-distance sort, hyper-local competition.
facts.evidence: comparison endpoint 200 for womens-clothing-standard with listing_count=1; distance fields often null; customer /en/compare 404
facts.gap: API exists; dedicated compare UI route missing; multi-vendor competition sparse
facts.impact: Core differentiator weakly demonstrated in prod demo
facts.recommended_action: P1 multi-vendor same SKU seed + customer compare UX entry

facts.fact: Submit-new-canonical enters moderation queue; admin/AI approve/merge/reject; auto-approve high-confidence duplicates.
facts.matching_strategy: schema statuses + OpenAPI + live status distribution
facts.evidence: products.status includes pending_moderation; live all 150 active (no queue depth); admin duplicates/merge paths in OpenAPI; auto-approve behavior NOT_AUDITABLE without exercising create
facts.gap: queue empty; auto-approve unproven; admin UI behind Access
facts.impact: Long-tail catalogue growth process unproven live
facts.recommended_action: P1 moderated create test in staging; document auto-merge rules

facts.fact: Additions (classes, pricing modes, condition models, attribute groups) fit as JSON attribute groups rather than new tables.
facts.evidence: products.spec jsonb exists; critical discriminators (product_class/condition/stock_mode) implemented as columns/CHECKs instead — OK for some attrs, but class/pricing modes not in spec either
facts.gap: neither JSON attrs nor columns encode product_class/pricing_mode
facts.impact: Documented extension path unused for key discriminators
facts.recommended_action: Prefer typed columns for class/pricing_mode; use spec for category attributes

facts.fact: Phase1 skips salaula, used phones, used furniture, MTO, heavy cement/sand, fragrances; makeup Tier2+.
facts.evidence: Phase1 roots only (no salaula/used roots) VERIFIED; prohibited_categories=7 (foundation); Tier2+ makeup enforcement NOT_AUDITABLE without KYC/listing policy probe
facts.impact: Risk if vendors can still list skipped goods via generic categories
facts.recommended_action: P1 audit listing create against prohibited + tier gates with vendor JWT

facts.fact: Tiered/volume pricing for wholesale-friendly listings.
facts.evidence: Schema+validator VERIFIED; live listings_with_tiers=0; wholesale_listings=0
facts.impact: B2B pricing not demonstrated
facts.recommended_action: P2 seed one wholesale tiered listing after business_buyers path ready

facts.fact: Quote-only mode: no public price; customer requests; vendor responds (bulk/B2B).
facts.matching_strategy: OpenAPI quote paths + product listing schema
facts.evidence: Service job quote endpoints exist; ListingCreateRequest requires price_ngwee (no quote-only product mode); job_quotes=0
facts.impact: Bulk corporate product RFQ not available
facts.recommended_action: P2 decide reuse services RFQ vs product quote-only mode

facts.fact: One search layer indexes listings including D/E without canonical product.
facts.evidence: 0 null-product listings live to observe indexing; search_documents populated (foundation 288) but not proven for D/E; would need create+reindex test
facts.impact: Discovery for unique listings unverified
facts.recommended_action: Staging test: quick_list → search_documents row → /search hit

facts.fact: Escrow + payments + ranking already decided; this brief sharpens catalogue.
facts.evidence: payments=0 ledger_txns=0; n8n payment reconciliation active; escrow auto-release workflow MISSING (foundation)
facts.impact: Release blocker for real commerce regardless of catalogue polish
facts.recommended_action: P0 prepaid ledger + escrow release proof before public_launch

facts.fact: Phase1 vendors should have stable supply, photograph well, fulfil reliably; depth over breadth.
facts.evidence: 3 demo vendors; 134 demo/ Cloudinary IDs; kyc_records=0; seller signup unavailable
facts.impact: Not a production vendor cohort
facts.recommended_action: P0 replace demo media/vendors under controlled onboarding

facts.fact: Search-and-attach default: vendor finds canonical, adds price/stock/condition only.
facts.evidence: API mode=attach exists; vendor.vergeo5.com health redirects to login (307); no vendor JWT in audit session
facts.gap: UI/customer/vendor gap — cannot verify UX timing or form fields
facts.impact: Primary acquisition mechanic unverified in UI
facts.recommended_action: Provide vendor test account for attach-flow UI audit

facts.fact: Used/refurbished are largest buyer-dispute source if not modelled carefully.
facts.evidence: disputes/returns empty (foundation) — no used-goods dispute traffic yet because used condition unsupported and 0 orders
facts.gap: absence expected pre-launch; not proof of readiness
facts.impact: Risk unrealized until used listings enabled
facts.recommended_action: Keep used goods gated until F009–F011 remediated

facts.fact: Digital goods include e-vouchers, software, event tickets, courses; tickets already in roadmap.
facts.evidence: event-tickets root present; other digital goods departments absent; always_available stock_mode exists for digital but unused (0 rows)
facts.impact: Only tickets category scaffolded among digital
facts.recommended_action: Phase1: tickets only; defer vouchers/courses
